고린도후서 13:1.content: This is the third time I am coming to you. “At the mouth of two or three witnesses shall every word be established.”

고린도후서 13:2.content: I have said beforehand, and I do say beforehand, as when I was present the second time, so now, being absent, I write to those who have sinned before now, and to all the rest, that, if I come again, I will not spare;

고린도후서 13:3.content: seeing that you seek a proof of Christ who speaks in me; who toward you is not weak, but is powerful in you.

고린도후서 13:4.content: For he was crucified through weakness, yet he lives through the power of God. For we also are weak in him, but we will live with him through the power of God toward you.

고린도후서 13:5.content: Examine your own selves, whether you are in the faith. Test your own selves. Or don’t you know about your own selves, that Jesus Christ is in you?—unless indeed you are disqualified.

고린도후서 13:6.content: But I hope that you will know that we aren’t disqualified.

고린도후서 13:7.content: Now I pray to God that you do no evil; not that we may appear approved, but that you may do that which is honorable, though we are as reprobate.

고린도후서 13:8.content: For we can do nothing against the truth, but for the truth.

고린도후서 13:9.content: For we rejoice when we are weak and you are strong. We also pray for this: your becoming perfect.

고린도후서 13:10.content: For this cause I write these things while absent, that I may not deal sharply when present, according to the authority which the Lord gave me for building up, and not for tearing down.

고린도후서 13:11.content: Finally, brothers, rejoice! Be perfected. Be comforted. Be of the same mind. Live in peace, and the God of love and peace will be with you.

고린도후서 13:12.content: Greet one another with a holy kiss.

고린도후서 13:14.content: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, God’s love, and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit be with you all. Amen.
